    WHERE LOWER(t.value) NOT IN ('a', 'about', 'above', 'after', 'again', 'against', 'ain', 'all', 'am', 'an', 'and', 'any', 'are', 'aren', 'arent', 'as', 'at', 'be', 'because', 'been', 'before', 'being', 'below', 'between', 'both', 'but', 'by', 'can', 'couldn', 'couldnt', 'd', 'did', 'didn', 'didnt', 'do', 'does', 'doesn', 'doesnt', 'doing', 'don', 'dont', 'down', 'during', 'each', 'few', 'for', 'from', 'further', 'had', 'hadn', 'hadnt', 'has', 'hasn', 'hasnt', 'have', 'haven', 'havent', 'having', 'he', 'her', 'here', 'hers', 'herself', 'him', 'himself', 'his', 'how', 'i', 'if', 'in', 'into', 'is', 'isn', 'isnt', 'it', 'its', 'itself', 'just', 'll', 'm', 'ma', 'me', 'mightn', 'mightnt', 'more', 'most', 'mustn', 'mustnt', 'my', 'myself', 'needn', 'neednt', 'no', 'nor', 'not', 'now', 'o', 'of', 'off', 'on', 'once', 'only', 'or', 'other', 'our', 'ours', 'ourselves', 'out', 'over', 'own', 're', 's', 'same', 'shan', 'shant', 'she', 'shes', 'should', 'shouldn', 'shouldnt', 'shouldve', 'so', 'some', 'such', 't', 'than', 'that', 'thatll', 'the', 'their', 'theirs', 'them', 'themselves', 'then', 'there', 'these', 'they', 'this', 'those', 'through', 'to', 'too', 'under', 'until', 'up', 've', 'very', 'was', 'wasn', 'wasnt', 'we', 'were', 'weren', 'werent', 'what', 'when', 'where', 'which', 'while', 'who', 'whom', 'why', 'will', 'with', 'won', 'wont', 'wouldn', 'wouldnt', 'y', 'you', 'youd', 'youll', 'your', 'youre', 'yours', 'yourself', 'yourselves', 'youve')
),
-- Get vectors and frequencies for article tokens
article_vectors AS (
    SELECT 
        at."id",
        at."date",
        at."title",
        gv."vector"::ARRAY AS vec,
        wf."frequency"
    FROM article_tokens at
    JOIN WORD_VECTORS_US.WORD_VECTORS_US.GLOVE_VECTORS gv ON LOWER(at.word) = LOWER(gv."word")
    JOIN WORD_VECTORS_US.WORD_VECTORS_US.WORD_FREQUENCIES wf ON LOWER(at.word) = LOWER(wf."word")
),
-- Compute weighted sum per article per dimension
article_weighted AS (
    SELECT 
        av."id",
        av."date",
        av."title",
        v.INDEX AS dim,
        SUM(v.value::FLOAT / POWER(av."frequency", 0.4)) AS weighted_sum
    FROM article_vectors av,
    LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => av.vec) v
    GROUP BY av."id", av."date", av."title", v.INDEX
),
-- Normalize each article vector
article_norm AS (
    SELECT 
        "id",
        "date",
        "title",
        SUM(weighted_sum * weighted_sum) AS norm_sq
    FROM article_weighted
    GROUP BY "id", "date", "title"
),
article_unit AS (
    SELECT 
        aw."id",
        aw."date",
        aw."title",
        aw.dim,
        aw.weighted_sum / SQRT(an.norm_sq) AS unit_vec
    FROM article_weighted aw
    JOIN article_norm an ON aw."id" = an."id"
),
-- Compute cosine similarity
cosine_sim AS (
    SELECT 
        au."id",
        au."date",
        au."title",
        SUM(au.unit_vec * qu.unit_vec) AS similarity
    FROM article_unit au, query_unit qu
    GROUP BY au."id", au."date", au."title"
)
SELECT 
    "id",
    "date",
    "title",
    similarity
FROM cosine_sim
ORDER BY similarity DESC
LIMIT 10

pred.bq389:
WITH pm10_monthly AS (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date_local) AS month,
    AVG(arithmetic_mean) AS avg_pm10
  FROM `bigquery-public-data.epa_historical_air_quality.pm10_daily_summary`
  WHERE state_code = '06' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date_local) = 2020
  GROUP BY month
),
pm25_frm_monthly AS (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date_local) AS month,
    AVG(sample_measurement) AS avg_pm25_frm
  FROM `bigquery-public-data.epa_historical_air_quality.pm25_frm_hourly_summary`
  WHERE state_code = '06' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date_local) = 2020
  GROUP BY month
),
pm25_non_frm_monthly AS (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date_local) AS month,
    AVG(arithmetic_mean) AS avg_pm25_non_frm
  FROM `bigquery-public-data.epa_historical_air_quality.pm25_frm_hourly_summary`
  WHERE state_code = '06' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date_local) = 2020 AND method_type != 'FRM'
  GROUP BY month
),
voc_monthly AS (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date_local) AS month,
    AVG(arithmetic_mean) AS avg_voc
  FROM `bigquery-public-data.epa_historical_air_quality.air_quality_annual_summary`
  WHERE state_code = '06' AND year = 2020 AND parameter_name LIKE '%VOC%'
  GROUP BY month
),
so2_monthly AS (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date_local) AS month,
    AVG(arithmetic_mean) * 10 AS avg_so2_scaled
  FROM `bigquery-public-data.epa_historical_air_quality.so2_daily_summary`
  WHERE state_code = '06' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date_local) = 2020
  GROUP BY month
),
lead_monthly AS (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date_local) AS month,
    AVG(arithmetic_mean) * 100 AS avg_lead_scaled
  FROM `bigquery-public-data.epa_historical_air_quality.lead_daily_summary`
  WHERE state_code = '06' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date_local) = 2020
  GROUP BY month
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(pm10.month, pm25_frm.month, pm25_non_frm.month, voc.month, so2.month, lead.month) AS month,
  pm10.avg_pm10,
  pm25_frm.avg_pm25_frm,
  pm25_non_frm.avg_pm25_non_frm,
  voc.avg_voc,
  so2.avg_so2_scaled,
  lead.avg_lead_scaled
FROM pm10_monthly pm10
FULL OUTER JOIN pm25_frm_monthly pm25_frm ON pm10.month = pm25_frm.month
FULL OUTER JOIN pm25_non_frm_monthly pm25_non_frm ON COALESCE(pm10.month, pm25_frm.month) = pm25_non_frm.month
FULL OUTER JOIN voc_monthly voc ON COALESCE(pm10.month, pm25_frm.month, pm25_non_frm.month) = voc.month
FULL OUTER JOIN so2_monthly so2 ON COALESCE(pm10.month, pm25_frm.month, pm25_non_frm.month, voc.month) = so2.month
FULL OUTER JOIN lead_monthly lead ON COALESCE(pm10.month, pm25_frm.month, pm25_non_frm.month, voc.month, so2.month) = lead.month
ORDER BY month

WITH no_refs AS (
    SELECT
        d."collection_id",
        d."StudyInstanceUID",
        d."SeriesInstanceUID",
        d."instance_size"
    FROM IDC.IDC_V17.DICOM_ALL d
    WHERE d."Modality" IN ('SEG', 'RTSTRUCT')
      AND d."SOPClassUID" = '1.2.840.10008.5.1.4.1.1.66.4'
      AND (d."ReferencedSeriesSequence" IS NULL OR ARRAY_SIZE(d."ReferencedSeriesSequence") = 0)
      AND (d."ReferencedImageSequence" IS NULL OR ARRAY_SIZE(d."ReferencedImageSequence") = 0)
      AND (d."SourceImageSequence" IS NULL OR ARRAY_SIZE(d."SourceImageSequence") = 0)
)
SELECT
    n."collection_id",
    n."StudyInstanceUID",
    n."SeriesInstanceUID",
    ROUND(SUM(n."instance_size") / 1024, 2) AS size_kilobytes,
    'https://viewer.imaging.datacommons.cancer.gov/viewer/' || n."StudyInstanceUID" AS viewer_url
FROM no_refs n
GROUP BY
    n."collection_id",
    n."StudyInstanceUID",
    n."SeriesInstanceUID"
ORDER BY size_kilobytes DESC

        UNION

        FROM IDC.IDC_V17.SEGMENTATIONS

pred.sf_bq421:
WITH specimen_prep AS (
  SELECT 
    dm."SOPInstanceUID",
    f.value:"SpecimenPreparationStepContentItemSequence"::VARIANT AS prep_step
  FROM IDC.IDC_V17.DICOM_METADATA dm,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => dm."SpecimenPreparationSequence") f
  WHERE dm."Modality" = 'SM'
),
prep_details AS (
  SELECT 
    sp."SOPInstanceUID",
    g.value:"ConceptNameCodeSequence"::VARIANT AS concept_name,
    g.value:"ConceptCodeSequence"::VARIANT AS concept_code
  FROM specimen_prep sp,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => sp.prep_step) g
),
embedding AS (
  SELECT 
    pd."SOPInstanceUID",
    pd.concept_code:"CodeValue"::STRING AS code_value,
    pd.concept_code:"CodeMeaning"::STRING AS code_meaning
  FROM prep_details pd
  WHERE pd.concept_name:"CodeValue"::STRING = '430863006'
    AND pd.concept_code:"CodingSchemeDesignator"::STRING = 'SCT'
),
staining AS (
  SELECT 
    pd."SOPInstanceUID",
    pd.concept_code:"CodeValue"::STRING AS code_value,
    pd.concept_code:"CodeMeaning"::STRING AS code_meaning
  FROM prep_details pd
  WHERE pd.concept_name:"CodeValue"::STRING = '430862001'
    AND pd.concept_code:"CodingSchemeDesignator"::STRING = 'SCT'
)
SELECT 
  e.code_meaning AS embedding_medium,
  s.code_meaning AS staining_substance,
  COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count
FROM embedding e
INNER JOIN staining s ON e."SOPInstanceUID" = s."SOPInstanceUID"
GROUP BY e.code_meaning, s.code_meaning
ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC
pred.sf_bq422:
WITH series_size AS (
    SELECT
        d."PatientID",
        d."SeriesInstanceUID",
        SUM(d."instance_size") / (1024 * 1024) AS series_size_mib
    FROM IDC.IDC_V17.DICOM_ALL d
    WHERE d."collection_id" = 'nlst'
      AND d."Modality" = 'CT'
    GROUP BY d."PatientID", d."SeriesInstanceUID"
),
patient_series_stats AS (
    SELECT
        s."PatientID",
        COUNT(DISTINCT s."SeriesInstanceUID") AS series_count,
        AVG(s.series_size_mib) AS avg_series_size_mib
    FROM series_size s
    GROUP BY s."PatientID"
),
slice_interval AS (
    SELECT
        d."PatientID",
        d."SeriesInstanceUID",
        ABS(d."SliceThickness") AS slice_interval
    FROM IDC.IDC_V17.DICOM_PIVOT d
    WHERE d."collection_id" = 'nlst'
      AND d."Modality" = 'CT'
      AND d."SliceThickness" IS NOT NULL
),
patient_slice_interval_diff AS (
    SELECT
        si."PatientID",
        (MAX(si.slice_interval) - MIN(si.slice_interval)) AS slice_interval_diff
    FROM slice_interval si
    GROUP BY si."PatientID"
),
top3_slice AS (
    SELECT
        ps."PatientID",
        ps.avg_series_size_mib
    FROM patient_series_stats ps
    JOIN patient_slice_interval_diff sid ON ps."PatientID" = sid."PatientID"
    ORDER BY sid.slice_interval_diff DESC
    LIMIT 3
),
exposure AS (
    SELECT
        d."PatientID",
        d."SeriesInstanceUID",
        d."Exposure" AS exposure_value
    FROM IDC.IDC_V17.DICOM_ALL d
    WHERE d."collection_id" = 'nlst'
      AND d."Modality" = 'CT'
      AND d."Exposure" IS NOT NULL
),
patient_exposure_diff AS (
    SELECT
        e."PatientID",
        (MAX(e.exposure_value) - MIN(e.exposure_value)) AS exposure_diff
    FROM exposure e
    GROUP BY e."PatientID"
),
top3_exposure AS (
    SELECT
        ps."PatientID",
        ps.avg_series_size_mib
    FROM patient_series_stats ps
    JOIN patient_exposure_diff ed ON ps."PatientID" = ed."PatientID"
    ORDER BY ed.exposure_diff DESC
    LIMIT 3
)
SELECT
    'Top 3 by Slice Interval' AS group_label,
    AVG(avg_series_size_mib) AS average_series_size_mib
FROM top3_slice
UNION ALL
SELECT
    'Top 3 by Max Exposure' AS group_label,
    AVG(avg_series_size_mib) AS average_series_size_mib
FROM top3_exposure
pred.sf_bq069:
WITH
-- Filter series: CT modality, exclude NLST, exclude localizers, exclude JPEG compression
filtered_series AS (
    SELECT
        "SeriesInstanceUID",
        "SeriesNumber",
        "StudyInstanceUID",
        "PatientID",
        "collection_name",
        "TransferSyntaxUID",
        "ImageType",
        "Modality",
        "instance_size",
        "SOPInstanceUID",
        "ImagePositionPatient" AS "ImagePositionPatient",
        "ImageOrientationPatient" AS "ImageOrientationPatient",
        "PixelSpacing" AS "PixelSpacing",
        "SliceThickness",
        "Rows" AS "Rows",
        "Columns" AS "Columns",
        "Exposure" AS "Exposure"
    FROM IDC.IDC_V17.DICOM_ALL
    WHERE "Modality" = 'CT'
      AND "collection_name" != 'NLST'
      AND "TransferSyntaxUID" NOT IN ('1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.70', '1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.51')
      AND NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM LATERAL FLATTEN(input => "ImageType") f
          WHERE f.value::STRING = 'LOCALIZER'
      )
),
-- Per series: check geometry conditions
series_checks AS (
    SELECT
        "SeriesInstanceUID",
        "SeriesNumber",
        "StudyInstanceUID",
        "PatientID",
        COUNT(DISTINCT "ImageOrientationPatient") AS distinct_orientation_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT "PixelSpacing") AS distinct_pixel_spacing_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT "SOPInstanceUID") AS sop_instance_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT "ImagePositionPatient") AS position_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT "Rows") AS distinct_rows_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT "Columns") AS distinct_columns_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT "SliceThickness") AS distinct_slice_thickness_count,
        SUM("instance_size") AS total_series_size_bytes,
        -- For dot product: compute cross product of first two orientation vectors and dot with [0,0,1]
        -- We'll compute per instance and then take max per series
        MAX(
            ABS(
                (PARSE_JSON("ImageOrientationPatient")[0]::FLOAT * PARSE_JSON("ImageOrientationPatient")[5]::FLOAT -
                 PARSE_JSON("ImageOrientationPatient")[1]::FLOAT * PARSE_JSON("ImageOrientationPatient")[4]::FLOAT) * 0 +
                (PARSE_JSON("ImageOrientationPatient")[1]::FLOAT * PARSE_JSON("ImageOrientationPatient")[3]::FLOAT -
                 PARSE_JSON("ImageOrientationPatient")[0]::FLOAT * PARSE_JSON("ImageOrientationPatient")[4]::FLOAT) * 0 +
                (PARSE_JSON("ImageOrientationPatient")[0]::FLOAT * PARSE_JSON("ImageOrientationPatient")[4]::FLOAT -
                 PARSE_JSON("ImageOrientationPatient")[1]::FLOAT * PARSE_JSON("ImageOrientationPatient")[3]::FLOAT) * 1
            )
        ) AS max_dot_product,
        -- Exposure stats
        COUNT(DISTINCT "Exposure") AS distinct_exposure_count,
        MAX("Exposure") AS max_exposure,
        MIN("Exposure") AS min_exposure,
        MAX("Exposure") - MIN("Exposure") AS exposure_range
    FROM filtered_series
    GROUP BY "SeriesInstanceUID", "SeriesNumber", "StudyInstanceUID", "PatientID"
    HAVING distinct_orientation_count = 1
       AND distinct_pixel_spacing_count = 1
       AND sop_instance_count = position_count
       AND distinct_rows_count = 1
       AND distinct_columns_count = 1
       AND max_dot_product BETWEEN 0.99 AND 1.01
),
-- Compute slice interval differences per series
slice_intervals AS (
    SELECT
        "SeriesInstanceUID",
        "ImagePositionPatient",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "SeriesInstanceUID" ORDER BY "ImagePositionPatient") AS rn
    FROM filtered_series
    WHERE "ImagePositionPatient" IS NOT NULL
),
slice_diffs AS (
    SELECT
        a."SeriesInstanceUID",
        ABS(a."ImagePositionPatient" - b."ImagePositionPatient") AS diff
    FROM slice_intervals a
    JOIN slice_intervals b
      ON a."SeriesInstanceUID" = b."SeriesInstanceUID"
     AND a.rn = b.rn - 1
),
slice_stats AS (
    SELECT
        "SeriesInstanceUID",
        MAX(diff) AS max_slice_interval,
        MIN(diff) AS min_slice_interval,
        MAX(diff) - MIN(diff) AS slice_interval_tolerance
    FROM slice_diffs
    GROUP BY "SeriesInstanceUID"
)
SELECT
    sc."SeriesInstanceUID" AS series_uid,
    sc."SeriesNumber" AS series_number,
    sc."StudyInstanceUID" AS study_uid,
    sc."PatientID" AS patient_id,
    sc.max_dot_product,
    sc.sop_instance_count AS total_sop_instances,
    sc.distinct_slice_thickness_count,
    ss.max_slice_interval,
    ss.min_slice_interval,
    ss.slice_interval_tolerance,
    sc.distinct_exposure_count,
    sc.max_exposure,
    sc.min_exposure,
    sc.exposure_range,
    ROUND(sc.total_series_size_bytes / (1024 * 1024), 2) AS series_size_mib
FROM series_checks sc
JOIN slice_stats ss
  ON sc."SeriesInstanceUID" = ss."SeriesInstanceUID"
ORDER BY ss.slice_interval_tolerance DESC, sc.exposure_range DESC, sc."SeriesInstanceUID" DESC
pred.sf_bq219:
WITH monthly_category_volume AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', "date") AS month,
        "category_name",
        SUM("volume_sold_liters") AS total_volume
    FROM IOWA_LIQUOR_SALES.IOWA_LIQUOR_SALES.SALES
    WHERE "date" >= '2022-01-01'
      AND "date" < DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY month, "category_name"
),
monthly_total_volume AS (
    SELECT
        month,
        SUM(total_volume) AS grand_total
    FROM monthly_category_volume
    GROUP BY month
),
monthly_category_pct AS (
    SELECT
        mcv.month,
        mcv."category_name",
        mcv.total_volume / mtv.grand_total AS pct
    FROM monthly_category_volume mcv
    JOIN monthly_total_volume mtv ON mcv.month = mtv.month
),
category_month_count AS (
    SELECT
        "category_name",
        COUNT(*) AS num_months,
        AVG(pct) AS avg_pct
    FROM monthly_category_pct
    GROUP BY "category_name"
    HAVING num_months >= 24 AND avg_pct >= 0.01
),
eligible_categories AS (
    SELECT "category_name" FROM category_month_count
),
category_pairs AS (
    SELECT
        a."category_name" AS cat1,
        b."category_name" AS cat2,
        CORR(a.pct, b.pct) AS pearson_r
    FROM monthly_category_pct a
    JOIN monthly_category_pct b ON a.month = b.month
    WHERE a."category_name" < b."category_name"
      AND a."category_name" IN (SELECT "category_name" FROM eligible_categories)
      AND b."category_name" IN (SELECT "category_name" FROM eligible_categories)
    GROUP BY cat1, cat2
)
SELECT cat1, cat2, pearson_r
FROM category_pairs

WITH

mutations AS (
    SELECT
        "case_id",
        "gene_symbol",
        "mutation_type"
    FROM TCGA.TCGA_VERSIONED.SIMPLE_MUTATION_TCGA_BLCA
    WHERE "gene_symbol" = 'CDKN2A'
),
-- Get clinical data for bladder cancer patients
clinical AS (
    SELECT
        "case_id",
        "gender",
        "vital_status",
        "days_to_death"
    FROM TCGA.TCGA_VERSIONED.CLINICAL_TCGA_BLCA
),
-- Get gene expression data for downstream genes
expression AS (
    SELECT
        "case_id",
        "gene_symbol",
        "expression_level"
    FROM TCGA.TCGA_VERSIONED.GENE_EXPRESSION_TCGA_BLCA
    WHERE "gene_symbol" IN ('MDM2', 'TP53', 'CDKN1A', 'CCNE1')
)
-- Combine all data
SELECT
    m."case_id",
    m."mutation_type",
    c."gender",
    c."vital_status",
    c."days_to_death",
    MAX(CASE WHEN e."gene_symbol" = 'MDM2' THEN e."expression_level" END) AS "MDM2_expression",
    MAX(CASE WHEN e."gene_symbol" = 'TP53' THEN e."expression_level" END) AS "TP53_expression",
    MAX(CASE WHEN e."gene_symbol" = 'CDKN1A' THEN e."expression_level" END) AS "CDKN1A_expression",
    MAX(CASE WHEN e."gene_symbol" = 'CCNE1' THEN e."expression_level" END) AS "CCNE1_expression"
FROM mutations m
LEFT JOIN clinical c ON m."case_id" = c."case_id"
LEFT JOIN expression e ON m."case_id" = e."case_id"

  SELECT 
    p.aliquot_submitter_id AS sample_submitter_id,
    p.gene_symbol,
    p.protein_abundance_log2ratio
  FROM `isb-cgc-bq.CPTAC.quant_proteome_CPTAC_CCRCC_discovery_study_pdc_current` p
  WHERE p.aliquot_submitter_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT aliquot_submitter_id 
    FROM `isb-cgc-bq.CPTAC.quant_proteome_CPTAC_CCRCC_discovery_study_pdc_current`
    WHERE aliquot_submitter_id LIKE 'CPT%'
  )
),
rna_data AS (
  SELECT 
    sample_submitter_id,
    gene_symbol,
    LOG(1 + fpkm) AS log_fpkm
  FROM `isb-cgc-bq.CPTAC.rnaseq_fpkm_CPTAC_CCRCC_discovery_study_pdc_current`
  WHERE sample_type IN ('Primary Tumor', 'Solid Tissue Normal')
),
joined AS (
  SELECT 
    p.sample_submitter_id,
    p.gene_symbol,
    p.protein_abundance_log2ratio,
    r.log_fpkm,
    CASE 
      WHEN r.sample_type = 'Primary Tumor' THEN 'Primary Tumor'
      ELSE 'Solid Tissue Normal'
    END AS sample_type
  FROM protein_data p
  INNER JOIN rna_data r
    ON p.sample_submitter_id = r.sample_submitter_id
    AND p.gene_symbol = r.gene_symbol
),
correlations AS (
  SELECT 
    sample_type,
    gene_symbol,
    CORR(protein_abundance_log2ratio, log_fpkm) AS correlation
  FROM joined
  GROUP BY sample_type, gene_symbol
  HAVING ABS(correlation) > 0.5
)

  sample_type,
  AVG(correlation) AS avg_correlation
FROM correlations
GROUP BY sample_type
ORDER BY sample_type

WITH cytoband AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "chromosome",
    "start_pos" AS hg38_start,
    "end_pos" AS hg38_stop,
    "chromosome" || ':' || "start_pos" || '-' || "end_pos" AS cytoband_name
  FROM TCGA_MITELMAN.TCGA_VERSIONED.COPY_NUMBER_SEGMENT_ALLELIC_HG38_GDC_R23
  WHERE "project_short_name" = 'TCGA-BRCA'
),
segments AS (
  SELECT
    "case_barcode",
    "chromosome",
    "start_pos",
    "end_pos",
    "copy_number"
  FROM TCGA_MITELMAN.TCGA_VERSIONED.COPY_NUMBER_SEGMENT_ALLELIC_HG38_GDC_R23
  WHERE "project_short_name" = 'TCGA-BRCA'
),
overlap_calc AS (
  SELECT
    c.cytoband_name,
    c.hg38_start,
    c.hg38_stop,
    s."case_barcode",
    s."copy_number",
    (ABS(c.hg38_stop - c.hg38_start) + ABS(s."end_pos" - s."start_pos") - ABS(c.hg38_stop - s."end_pos") - ABS(c.hg38_start - s."start_pos")) / 2 AS overlap
  FROM cytoband c
  JOIN segments s
    ON c."chromosome" = s."chromosome"
    AND s."start_pos" < c.hg38_stop
    AND s."end_pos" > c.hg38_start
),
weighted AS (
  SELECT
    cytoband_name,
    hg38_start,
    hg38_stop,
    "case_barcode",
    ROUND(SUM(overlap * "copy_number") / NULLIF(SUM(overlap), 0)) AS rounded_cn
  FROM overlap_calc
  WHERE overlap > 0
  GROUP BY cytoband_name, hg38_start, hg38_stop, "case_barcode"
),
cnv_type AS (
  SELECT
    cytoband_name,
    hg38_start,
    hg38_stop,
    "case_barcode",
    CASE
      WHEN rounded_cn = 0 THEN 'homozygous deletion'
      WHEN rounded_cn = 1 THEN 'heterozygous deletion'
      WHEN rounded_cn = 2 THEN 'normal diploid'
      WHEN rounded_cn = 3 THEN 'gain'
      WHEN rounded_cn > 3 THEN 'amplification'
    END AS cnv_type
  FROM weighted
),
total_cases AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "case_barcode") AS total
  FROM TCGA_MITELMAN.TCGA_VERSIONED.COPY_NUMBER_SEGMENT_ALLELIC_HG38_GDC_R23
  WHERE "project_short_name" = 'TCGA-BRCA'
)
SELECT
  c.cytoband_name,
  c.hg38_start,
  c.hg38_stop,
  ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN cnv_type = 'homozygous deletion' THEN "case_barcode" END) * 100.0 / t.total, 2) AS homozygous_deletion_pct,
  ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN cnv_type = 'heterozygous deletion' THEN "case_barcode" END) * 100.0 / t.total, 2) AS heterozygous_deletion_pct,
  ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN cnv_type = 'normal diploid' THEN "case_barcode" END) * 100.0 / t.total, 2) AS normal_diploid_pct,
  ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN cnv_type = 'gain' THEN "case_barcode" END) * 100.0 / t.total, 2) AS gain_pct,
  ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN cnv_type = 'amplification' THEN "case_barcode" END) * 100.0 / t.total, 2) AS amplification_pct
FROM cnv_type c
CROSS JOIN total_cases t
GROUP BY c.cytoband_name, c.hg38_start, c.hg38_stop, t.total
ORDER BY c.cytoband_name

        r."normalized_count",
        LOG10(r."normalized_count") AS log_expression
    FROM TCGA_HG19_DATA_V0.TCGA_HG19_DATA_V0.RNASEQ_GENE_EXPRESSION_UNC_RSEM r
    WHERE r."project_short_name" = 'TCGA-BRCA'
      AND r."HGNC_gene_symbol" = 'TP53'
      AND r."normalized_count" IS NOT NULL
      AND r."normalized_count" > 0
),
-- Step 2: Get TP53 mutation types for TCGA-BRCA samples
tp53_mutations AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        m."case_barcode",
        m."Variant_Classification" AS mutation_type
    FROM TCGA_HG19_DATA_V0.TCGA_HG19_DATA_V0.SOMATIC_MUTATION_MC3 m
    WHERE m."project_short_name" = 'TCGA-BRCA'
      AND m."Hugo_Symbol" = 'TP53'
      AND m."Variant_Classification" IS NOT NULL
),
-- Step 3: Merge expression and mutation data
merged_data AS (
    SELECT 
        e."case_barcode",
        e."sample_barcode",
        e."log_expression",
        COALESCE(m."mutation_type", 'No_Mutation') AS mutation_type
    FROM tp53_expression e
    LEFT JOIN tp53_mutations m ON e."case_barcode" = m."case_barcode"
),
-- Step 4: Compute grand mean
grand_mean AS (
    SELECT AVG("log_expression") AS grand_mean_val
    FROM merged_data
),
-- Step 5: Compute group-level statistics
group_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        "mutation_type",
        COUNT(*) AS n_j,
        AVG("log_expression") AS group_mean,
        SUM(POWER("log_expression" - AVG("log_expression") OVER (PARTITION BY "mutation_type"), 2)) AS ss_within_group
    FROM merged_data
    GROUP BY "mutation_type"
),
-- Step 6: Compute SSB, SSW, degrees of freedom
anova_components AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(DISTINCT "mutation_type") AS k,
        COUNT(*) AS N,
        SUM(n_j * POWER(group_mean - (SELECT grand_mean_val FROM grand_mean), 2)) AS SSB,
        SUM(ss_within_group) AS SSW
    FROM group_stats
)
-- Step 7: Compute MSB, MSW, F-statistic
SELECT 
    N AS total_samples,
    k AS mutation_types,
    SSB / (k - 1) AS mean_square_between,
    SSW / (N - k) AS mean_square_within,
    (SSB / (k - 1)) / NULLIF(SSW / (N - k), 0) AS f_statistic
FROM anova_components
pred.sf_bq155:
WITH 
-- Filter BRCA patients by age and pathological stage
brca_patients AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c."case_barcode"
    FROM TCGA_HG38_DATA_V0.TCGA_BIOCLIN_V0.CLINICAL c
    WHERE c."project_short_name" = 'TCGA-BRCA'
      AND c."age_at_diagnosis" <= 80
      AND c."pathologic_stage" IN ('Stage I', 'Stage II', 'Stage IIA')
),
-- Average RNA-Seq expression for SNORA31 per sample (log10(avg_counts+1))
snorna31_rna AS (
    SELECT 
        r."sample_barcode",
        LOG10(AVG(r."HTSeq__Counts") + 1) AS avg_log10_counts
    FROM TCGA_HG38_DATA_V0.TCGA_HG38_DATA_V0.RNASEQ_GENE_EXPRESSION r
    INNER JOIN brca_patients bp ON r."case_barcode" = bp."case_barcode"
    WHERE r."gene_name" = 'SNORA31'
    GROUP BY r."sample_barcode"
),
-- Average microRNA-Seq expression per sample (placeholder: using RNASEQ_GENE_EXPRESSION for microRNAs)
-- Note: The schema does not have a dedicated microRNA-Seq table. We assume microRNAs are in RNASEQ_GENE_EXPRESSION with gene_type like 'miRNA'
mirna_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        r."sample_barcode",
        AVG(r."HTSeq__Counts") AS avg_mirna_counts
    FROM TCGA_HG38_DATA_V0.TCGA_HG38_DATA_V0.RNASEQ_GENE_EXPRESSION r
    INNER JOIN brca_patients bp ON r."case_barcode" = bp."case_barcode"
    WHERE r."gene_type" = 'miRNA'
    GROUP BY r."sample_barcode"
),
-- Pairs with more than 25 samples
paired_data AS (
    SELECT 
        s.sample_barcode,
        s.avg_log10_counts,
        m.avg_mirna_counts
    FROM snorna31_rna s
    INNER JOIN mirna_avg m ON s.sample_barcode = m.sample_barcode
),
pair_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS n,
        CORR(avg_log10_counts, avg_mirna_counts) AS r
    FROM paired_data
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 25 AND ABS(CORR(avg_log10_counts, avg_mirna_counts)) BETWEEN 0.3 AND 1.0
)
-- Calculate t-statistic: t = r * sqrt((n-2)/(1-r^2))
SELECT 
    r * SQRT((n - 2) / (1 - r * r)) AS t_statistic
FROM pair_stats
pred.sf_bq141:
WITH
kirp_patients AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        c."case_barcode",
        c."clinical_stage"
    FROM TCGA_HG38_DATA_V0.TCGA_BIOCLIN_V0.CLINICAL c
    WHERE c."disease_code" = 'KIRP'
      AND c."clinical_stage" IS NOT NULL
),
gene_expression AS (
    SELECT
        r."case_barcode",
        r."gene_name",
        r."HTSeq__FPKM_UQ"
    FROM TCGA_HG38_DATA_V0.TCGA_HG38_DATA_V0.RNASEQ_GENE_EXPRESSION r
    WHERE r."gene_name" IN ('MT-CO3', 'MT-CO1', 'MT-CO2')
),
patient_data AS (
    SELECT
        p."case_barcode",
        p."clinical_stage",
        g."gene_name",
        g."HTSeq__FPKM_UQ",
        MOD(ABS(HASH(p."case_barcode")), 100) AS hash_mod
    FROM kirp_patients p
    JOIN gene_expression g ON p."case_barcode" = g."case_barcode"
),
training_data AS (
    SELECT
        "case_barcode",
        "clinical_stage",
        "gene_name",
        "HTSeq__FPKM_UQ"
    FROM patient_data
    WHERE hash_mod < 90
),
test_data AS (
    SELECT
        "case_barcode",
        "clinical_stage",
        "gene_name",
        "HTSeq__FPKM_UQ"
    FROM patient_data
    WHERE hash_mod >= 90
),
stage_averages AS (
    SELECT
        "clinical_stage",
        "gene_name",
        AVG("HTSeq__FPKM_UQ") AS avg_expression
    FROM training_data
    GROUP BY "clinical_stage", "gene_name"
),
stage_avg_pivot AS (
    SELECT
        "clinical_stage",
        MAX(CASE WHEN "gene_name" = 'MT-CO3' THEN avg_expression END) AS avg_mtco3,
        MAX(CASE WHEN "gene_name" = 'MT-CO1' THEN avg_expression END) AS avg_mtco1,
        MAX(CASE WHEN "gene_name" = 'MT-CO2' THEN avg_expression END) AS avg_mtco2
    FROM stage_averages
    GROUP BY "clinical_stage"
),
test_pivot AS (
    SELECT
        "case_barcode",
        MAX(CASE WHEN "gene_name" = 'MT-CO3' THEN "HTSeq__FPKM_UQ" END) AS expr_mtco3,
        MAX(CASE WHEN "gene_name" = 'MT-CO1' THEN "HTSeq__FPKM_UQ" END) AS expr_mtco1,
        MAX(CASE WHEN "gene_name" = 'MT-CO2' THEN "HTSeq__FPKM_UQ" END) AS expr_mtco2
    FROM test_data
    GROUP BY "case_barcode"
),
distance_calc AS (
    SELECT
        t."case_barcode",
        s."clinical_stage",
        SQRT(
            POWER(t.expr_mtco3 - s.avg_mtco3, 2) +
            POWER(t.expr_mtco1 - s.avg_mtco1, 2) +
            POWER(t.expr_mtco2 - s.avg_mtco2, 2)
        ) AS distance
    FROM test_pivot t
    CROSS JOIN stage_avg_pivot s
),
ranked_distances AS (
    SELECT
        "case_barcode",
        "clinical_stage",
        distance,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "case_barcode" ORDER BY distance ASC) AS rn
    FROM distance_calc
)
SELECT
    "case_barcode",
    "clinical_stage" AS predicted_clinical_stage
FROM ranked_distances
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY "case_barcode"
pred.bq046:
WITH 
-- Patients from Annotations table with specific conditions
annotations_patients AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT a.case_barcode, a.case_gdc_id
  FROM `isb-cgc.TCGA_bioclin_v0.Annotations` a
  WHERE a.entity_type = 'Patient'
    AND (a.category = 'History of unacceptable prior treatment related to a prior/other malignancy' OR a.classification = 'Redaction')
),
-- Patients from Clinical table with BRCA, age <= 30, female
clinical_patients AS (
  SELECT c.case_barcode, c.case_gdc_id
  FROM `isb-cgc.TCGA_bioclin_v0.Clinical` c
  WHERE c.disease_code = 'BRCA'
    AND c.age_at_diagnosis <= 30
    AND c.gender = 'FEMALE'
),
-- Full join between the two sets, keep only where both are NULL
filtered_patients AS (
  SELECT 
    COALESCE(a.case_barcode, c.case_barcode) AS case_barcode,
    COALESCE(a.case_gdc_id, c.case_gdc_id) AS case_gdc_id
  FROM annotations_patients a
  FULL JOIN clinical_patients c
    ON a.case_gdc_id = c.case_gdc_id
  WHERE a.case_gdc_id IS NULL AND c.case_gdc_id IS NULL
)
-- Get file URLs from GDC metadata
SELECT 
  f.case_barcode,
  u.url AS gdc_file_url
FROM filtered_patients fp
JOIN `isb-cgc.GDC_metadata.rel14_fileData_current` f
  ON fp.case_gdc_id = f.case_gdc_id
JOIN `isb-cgc.GDC_metadata.rel14_GDCfileID_to_GCSurl_NEW` u
  ON f.file_gdc_id = u.file_gdc_id
ORDER BY fp.case_barcode

WITH gene_expression AS (

        e."ParticipantBarcode",

    FROM PANCANCER_ATLAS_1.PANCANCER_ATLAS_FILTERED.EBPP_ADJUSTPANCAN_ILLUMINAHISEQ_RNASEQV2_GENEXP_FILTERED e
    WHERE e."Study" = 'LGG'
      AND e."Symbol" = 'IGF2'
      AND e."normalized_count" IS NOT NULL
),
avg_expression AS (
    SELECT
        "ParticipantBarcode",
        AVG(log10_expression) AS avg_log10_expression
    FROM gene_expression
    GROUP BY "ParticipantBarcode"
),
clinical_data AS (
    SELECT
        c."bcr_patient_barcode" AS "ParticipantBarcode",
        c."icd_o_3_histology"
    FROM PANCANCER_ATLAS_1.PANCANCER_ATLAS_FILTERED.CLINICAL_PANCAN_PATIENT_WITH_FOLLOWUP_FILTERED c
    WHERE c."acronym" = 'LGG'
      AND c."icd_o_3_histology" IS NOT NULL
      AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE(c."icd_o_3_histology', '^\\[.*\\]$')
),
combined AS (
    SELECT
        a."ParticipantBarcode",
        a.avg_log10_expression,
        c."icd_o_3_histology"
    FROM avg_expression a
    INNER JOIN clinical_data c ON a."ParticipantBarcode" = c."ParticipantBarcode"
),
grouped AS (
    SELECT
        "icd_o_3_histology",
        COUNT(*) AS group_size,
        LISTAGG(avg_log10_expression, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY avg_log10_expression) AS expression_list

    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        "icd_o_3_histology",
        group_size,
        expression_list,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "icd_o_3_histology") AS group_id
    FROM grouped
),
all_values AS (
    SELECT
        avg_log10_expression,
        "icd_o_3_histology"
    FROM combined
    WHERE "icd_o_3_histology" IN (SELECT "icd_o_3_histology" FROM grouped)
),
ranked_values AS (
    SELECT
        avg_log10_expression,
        "icd_o_3_histology",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY avg_log10_expression) AS global_rank
    FROM all_values
),
group_stats AS (
    SELECT
        rv."icd_o_3_histology",
        COUNT(*) AS ni,
        SUM(rv.global_rank) AS Ri,
        SUM(rv.global_rank * rv.global_rank) AS Ri_sq
    FROM ranked_values rv
    GROUP BY rv."icd_o_3_histology"
),
total_stats AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total_samples,
        SUM(global_rank) AS total_rank_sum,
        SUM(global_rank * global_rank) AS total_rank_sq
    FROM ranked_values
),
kruskal_wallis AS (
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grouped) AS num_groups,
        (SELECT total_samples FROM total_stats) AS total_samples,
        (12.0 / (total_samples * (total_samples + 1))) * SUM(Ri_sq / ni) - 3 * (total_samples + 1) AS H
    FROM group_stats, total_stats
)

    num_groups,
    total_samples,
    H AS kruskal_wallis_h_score
FROM kruskal_wallis
ORDER BY H DESC

WITH
tp53_mut AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT m."ParticipantBarcode"
    FROM PANCANCER_ATLAS_1.PANCANCER_ATLAS_FILTERED.MC3_MAF_V5_ONE_PER_TUMOR_SAMPLE m
    WHERE m."Study" = 'LGG'
      AND m."Hugo_Symbol" = 'TP53'
      AND m."FILTER" = 'PASS'
),
expr AS (
    SELECT e."ParticipantBarcode",
           LOG(10, e."normalized_count" + 1) AS log_expr
    FROM PANCANCER_ATLAS_1.PANCANCER_ATLAS_FILTERED.EBPP_ADJUSTPANCAN_ILLUMINAHISEQ_RNASEQV2_GENEXP_FILTERED e
    WHERE e."Study" = 'LGG'
      AND e."Symbol" = 'DRG2'
),
mut_agg AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS N_y,
           SUM(e.log_expr) AS S_y,
           SUM(e.log_expr * e.log_expr) AS Q_y
    FROM expr e
    INNER JOIN tp53_mut m ON e."ParticipantBarcode" = m."ParticipantBarcode"
),
all_agg AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS N_all,
           SUM(e.log_expr) AS S_all,
           SUM(e.log_expr * e.log_expr) AS Q_all
    FROM expr e
),
stats AS (
    SELECT 
        N_y,
        S_y,
        Q_y,
        (N_all - N_y) AS N_n,
        (S_all - S_y) AS S_n,
        (Q_all - Q_y) AS Q_n
    FROM mut_agg, all_agg
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        ( (S_y / N_y) - (S_n / N_n) ) /
        SQRT(
            ( (1.0/(N_y-1)) * (Q_y - (S_y*S_y)/N_y) ) / N_y +
            ( (1.0/(N_n-1)) * (Q_n - (S_n*S_n)/N_n) ) / N_n
        )
    , 2) AS t_score
FROM stats
WHERE N_y >= 10 AND N_n >= 10
  AND ( (1.0/(N_y-1)) * (Q_y - (S_y*S_y)/N_y) ) > 0
  AND ( (1.0/(N_n-1)) * (Q_n - (S_n*S_n)/N_n) ) > 0

    WHERE "Study" = 'LGG'

      AND "FILTER" = 'PASS'

    WHERE "Study" = 'LGG'
),
drg2_expr AS (
    SELECT e."ParticipantBarcode",
           LOG(10, e."normalized_count" + 1) AS log_expr
    FROM PANCANCER_ATLAS_1.PANCANCER_ATLAS_FILTERED.EBPP_ADJUSTPANCAN_ILLUMINAHISEQ_RNASEQV2_GENEXP_FILTERED e
    INNER JOIN lgg_samples s

        ON a."ParticipantBarcode" = tp53."ParticipantBarcode"

        COUNT(CASE WHEN has_tp53_mut = 0 THEN 1 END) AS n2,

WITH mutation_status AS (
    SELECT 
        c."bcr_patient_barcode" AS patient_barcode,
        c."histological_type",
        CASE 
            WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN a."Gene_Symbol" = 'CDH1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'Mutated'
            ELSE 'Wildtype'
        END AS cdh1_mutation_status
    FROM PANCANCER_ATLAS_1.PANCANCER_ATLAS_FILTERED.CLINICAL_PANCAN_PATIENT_WITH_FOLLOWUP_FILTERED c
    LEFT JOIN PANCANCER_ATLAS_1.PANCANCER_ATLAS_FILTERED.ALL_CNVR_DATA_BY_GENE_FILTERED a
        ON c."bcr_patient_barcode" = a."ParticipantBarcode"
    WHERE c."disease_code" = 'BRCA'
        AND c."histological_type" IS NOT NULL
        AND c."histological_type" != ''
    GROUP BY c."bcr_patient_barcode", c."histological_type"
),
contingency AS (
    SELECT 
        "histological_type",
        cdh1_mutation_status,
        COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM mutation_status
    GROUP BY "histological_type", cdh1_mutation_status
),
marginals AS (
    SELECT 
        "histological_type",
        SUM(count) AS row_total
    FROM contingency
    GROUP BY "histological_type"
    HAVING SUM(count) > 10
),
mutation_marginals AS (
    SELECT 
        cdh1_mutation_status,
        SUM(count) AS col_total
    FROM contingency
    GROUP BY cdh1_mutation_status
    HAVING SUM(count) > 10
),
filtered_contingency AS (
    SELECT 
        c."histological_type",
        c.cdh1_mutation_status,
        c.count
    FROM contingency c
    INNER JOIN marginals m ON c."histological_type" = m."histological_type"
    INNER JOIN mutation_marginals mm ON c.cdh1_mutation_status = mm.cdh1_mutation_status
),
totals AS (
    SELECT SUM(count) AS grand_total FROM filtered_contingency
),
expected AS (
    SELECT 
        fc."histological_type",
        fc.cdh1_mutation_status,
        fc.count AS observed,
        (m.row_total * mm.col_total) / t.grand_total AS expected
    FROM filtered_contingency fc
    INNER JOIN marginals m ON fc."histological_type" = m."histological_type"
    INNER JOIN mutation_marginals mm ON fc.cdh1_mutation_status = mm.cdh1_mutation_status
    CROSS JOIN totals t
)
SELECT 
    SUM(POWER(observed - expected, 2) / expected) AS chi_square_value
FROM expected

      ON p.bcr_patient_barcode = c.bcr_patient_barcode
  ),
  tp53_mutations AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
      c.bcr_patient_barcode,
      1 AS tp53_mutated
    FROM `isb-cgc-bq.pancancer_atlas.Filtered_clinical_PANCAN_patient_with_followup` c
    INNER JOIN `isb-cgc-bq.pancancer_atlas.merged_sample_quality_annotations` q
      ON c.bcr_patient_barcode = q.patient_barcode
    WHERE c.acronym = 'PAAD'
      AND q.patient_annotation LIKE '%TP53%'
  ),
  mutation_combined AS (
    SELECT 
      k.bcr_patient_barcode,
      k.kras_mutated,
      COALESCE(t.tp53_mutated, 0) AS tp53_mutated
    FROM kras_mutations k
    LEFT JOIN tp53_mutations t
      ON k.bcr_patient_barcode = t.bcr_patient_barcode
  ),
  counts AS (
    SELECT
      kras_mutated,
      tp53_mutated,
      COUNT(*) AS observed
    FROM mutation_combined
    GROUP BY kras_mutated, tp53_mutated
  ),
  totals AS (
    SELECT
      SUM(observed) AS total,
      SUM(CASE WHEN kras_mutated = 1 THEN observed ELSE 0 END) AS kras_pos_total,
      SUM(CASE WHEN kras_mutated = 0 THEN observed ELSE 0 END) AS kras_neg_total,
      SUM(CASE WHEN tp53_mutated = 1 THEN observed ELSE 0 END) AS tp53_pos_total,
      SUM(CASE WHEN tp53_mutated = 0 THEN observed ELSE 0 END) AS tp53_neg_total
    FROM counts
  ),
  expected AS (
    SELECT
      c.kras_mutated,
      c.tp53_mutated,
      c.observed,
      CASE 
        WHEN c.kras_mutated = 1 AND c.tp53_mutated = 1 THEN t.kras_pos_total * t.tp53_pos_total / t.total
        WHEN c.kras_mutated = 1 AND c.tp53_mutated = 0 THEN t.kras_pos_total * t.tp53_neg_total / t.total
        WHEN c.kras_mutated = 0 AND c.tp53_mutated = 1 THEN t.kras_neg_total * t.tp53_pos_total / t.total
        WHEN c.kras_mutated = 0 AND c.tp53_mutated = 0 THEN t.kras_neg_total * t.tp53_neg_total / t.total
      END AS expected
    FROM counts c, totals t
  ),
  chi_sq_components AS (
    SELECT
      SUM(POW(c.observed - e.expected, 2) / e.expected) AS chi_squared_statistic
    FROM expected e
    JOIN counts c ON c.kras_mutated = e.kras_mutated AND c.tp53_mutated = e.tp53_mutated
  )
SELECT 
  ROUND(chi_squared_statistic, 4) AS chi_squared_statistic,
  1 AS degrees_of_freedom
FROM chi_sq_components

WITH female_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        "FEATURE_NAME" AS gene,
        AVG("X_VALUE") AS female_avg_x
    FROM HTAN_2.HTAN.SCRNASEQ_MSK_SCLC_COMBINED_SAMPLES_CURRENT
    WHERE "SEX" = 'female'
      AND "CLUSTERS" = '41'
      AND "DEVELOPMENT_STAGE" = '74-year-old human stage'
      AND "CELL_TYPE" = 'epithelial cell'
    GROUP BY "FEATURE_NAME"
),
male_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        "FEATURE_NAME" AS gene,
        AVG("X_VALUE") AS male_avg_x
    FROM HTAN_2.HTAN.SCRNASEQ_MSK_SCLC_COMBINED_SAMPLES_CURRENT
    WHERE "SEX" = 'male'
      AND "CLUSTERS" = '41'
      AND "DEVELOPMENT_STAGE" = '74-year-old human stage'
      AND "CELL_TYPE" = 'epithelial cell'
    GROUP BY "FEATURE_NAME"
)
SELECT 
    f.gene,
    f.female_avg_x - m.male_avg_x AS difference
FROM female_avg f
JOIN male_avg m ON f.gene = m.gene
ORDER BY ABS(f.female_avg_x - m.male_avg_x) DESC
LIMIT 20

pred.sf_bq166:
WITH cyto AS (
  SELECT * FROM TCGA_MITELMAN.TCGA_VERSIONED.CYTOBANDS_HG38
),
seg AS (
  SELECT
    "case_barcode",
    "sample_barcode",
    "chromosome",
    "start_pos",
    "end_pos",
    "copy_number"
  FROM TCGA_MITELMAN.TCGA_VERSIONED.COPY_NUMBER_SEGMENT_ALLELIC_HG38_GDC_R23
  WHERE "project_short_name" = 'TCGA-KIRC'
),
overlap AS (
  SELECT
    s."case_barcode",
    s."sample_barcode",
    c."chromosome",
    c."cyto_band",
    s."copy_number",
    GREATEST(0, LEAST(s."end_pos", c."hg38_stop") - GREATEST(s."start_pos", c."hg38_start")) AS overlap_bp
  FROM seg s
  JOIN cyto c
    ON s."chromosome" = c."chromosome"
   AND s."start_pos" < c."hg38_stop"
   AND s."end_pos" > c."hg38_start"
),
max_per_band AS (
  SELECT
    "case_barcode",
    "sample_barcode",
    "chromosome",
    "cyto_band",
    MAX("copy_number") AS max_cn
  FROM overlap
  WHERE overlap_bp > 0
  GROUP BY "case_barcode", "sample_barcode", "chromosome", "cyto_band"
),
classified AS (
  SELECT
    "case_barcode",
    "sample_barcode",
    "chromosome",
    "cyto_band",
    max_cn,
    CASE
      WHEN max_cn > 3 THEN 'Amplification'
      WHEN max_cn = 3 THEN 'Gain'
      WHEN max_cn = 0 THEN 'Homozygous Deletion'
      WHEN max_cn = 1 THEN 'Heterozygous Deletion'
      WHEN max_cn = 2 THEN 'Normal'
      ELSE 'Other'
    END AS cnv_subtype
  FROM max_per_band
),
total_cases AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "case_barcode") AS total FROM seg
),
subtype_counts AS (
  SELECT
    "chromosome",
    "cyto_band",
    cnv_subtype,
    COUNT(DISTINCT "case_barcode") AS case_count
  FROM classified
  GROUP BY "chromosome", "cyto_band", cnv_subtype
)
SELECT
  s."chromosome",
  s."cyto_band",
  s.cnv_subtype,
  ROUND(100.0 * s.case_count / t.total, 2) AS percentage
FROM subtype_counts s
CROSS JOIN total_cases t
ORDER BY
  TRY_CAST(NULLIF(REGEXP_REPLACE(s."chromosome", 'chr', ''), '') AS INTEGER),
  s."chromosome",
  s."cyto_band",
  s.cnv_subtype
pred.bq165:
WITH
  -- Filter RecurrentNumData for breast cancer (morphology='3111') and adenocarcinoma (topo='0401')
  num_data AS (
    SELECT
      Chromosome,
      Abnormality,
      CAST(TotalCases AS INT64) AS TotalCases
    FROM `mitelman-db.prod.RecurrentNumData`
    WHERE Morph = '3111' AND Topo = '0401'
  ),
  -- Filter RecurrentData for breast cancer (morphology='3111') and adenocarcinoma (topo='0401')
  rec_data AS (
    SELECT
      Chromosome,
      Band,
      Abnormality,
      CAST(TotalCases AS INT64) AS TotalCases,
      ChrOrder
    FROM `mitelman-db.prod.RecurrentData`
    WHERE Morph = '3111' AND Topo = '0401'
  ),
  -- Classify each abnormality into gain/loss type
  classified AS (
    -- Gains from RecurrentNumData: +chromosome (1 extra copy)
    SELECT
      Chromosome,
      'gain' AS event_type,
      TotalCases,
      ChrOrder AS ord
    FROM num_data
    WHERE Abnormality LIKE '+%' AND Abnormality NOT LIKE '++%'
    UNION ALL
    -- Amplifications from RecurrentNumData: ++chromosome (more than 1 extra copy)
    SELECT
      Chromosome,
      'amplification' AS event_type,
      TotalCases,
      ChrOrder AS ord
    FROM num_data
    WHERE Abnormality LIKE '++%'
    UNION ALL
    -- Losses from RecurrentNumData: -chromosome (1 copy loss)
    SELECT
      Chromosome,
      'loss' AS event_type,
      TotalCases,
      ChrOrder AS ord
    FROM num_data
    WHERE Abnormality LIKE '-%' AND Abnormality NOT LIKE '--%'
    UNION ALL
    -- Homozygous deletions from RecurrentNumData: --chromosome (loss of 2 copies)
    SELECT
      Chromosome,
      'homozygous_deletion' AS event_type,
      TotalCases,
      ChrOrder AS ord
    FROM num_data
    WHERE Abnormality LIKE '--%'
    UNION ALL
    -- For band-level data, we need to map abnormalities to bands.
    -- RecurrentData has Band column; we classify based on Abnormality pattern.
    -- Gains: abnormalities like '+band' or 'add(band)' etc. We'll use pattern: contains '+' but not '++'
    SELECT
      Chromosome,
      'gain' AS event_type,
      TotalCases,
      ChrOrder AS ord
    FROM rec_data
    WHERE Abnormality LIKE '%+%' AND Abnormality NOT LIKE '%++%'
    UNION ALL
    -- Amplifications: '++' pattern
    SELECT
      Chromosome,
      'amplification' AS event_type,
      TotalCases,
      ChrOrder AS ord
    FROM rec_data
    WHERE Abnormality LIKE '%++%'
    UNION ALL
    -- Losses: '-' but not '--'
    SELECT
      Chromosome,
      'loss' AS event_type,
      TotalCases,
      ChrOrder AS ord
    FROM rec_data
    WHERE Abnormality LIKE '%-%' AND Abnormality NOT LIKE '%--%'
    UNION ALL
    -- Homozygous deletions: '--'
    SELECT
      Chromosome,
      'homozygous_deletion' AS event_type,
      TotalCases,
      ChrOrder AS ord
    FROM rec_data
    WHERE Abnormality LIKE '%--%'
  ),
  -- Aggregate counts per chromosome and event type
  aggregated AS (
    SELECT
      Chromosome,
      event_type,
      SUM(TotalCases) AS total_cases
    FROM classified
    GROUP BY Chromosome, event_type
  ),
  -- Pivot to get counts per event type per chromosome
  pivoted AS (
    SELECT
      Chromosome,
      COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'amplification' THEN total_cases END), 0) AS amplification_count,
      COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'gain' THEN total_cases END), 0) AS gain_count,
      COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'loss' THEN total_cases END), 0) AS loss_count,
      COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'homozygous_deletion' THEN total_cases END), 0) AS homozygous_deletion_count
    FROM aggregated
    GROUP BY Chromosome
  ),
  -- Get total cases per chromosome for frequency calculation
  total_per_chromosome AS (
    SELECT
      Chromosome,
      SUM(total_cases) AS total
    FROM aggregated
    GROUP BY Chromosome
  ),
  -- Join with CytoBands_hg38 to get band-level coordinates
  bands AS (
    SELECT
      b.chromosome,
      b.cytoband_name AS band,
      b.hg38_start,
      b.hg38_stop,
      -- Map chromosome to numeric order (handle X=23, Y=24)
      CASE
        WHEN b.chromosome = 'X' THEN 23
        WHEN b.chromosome = 'Y' THEN 24
        ELSE CAST(b.chromosome AS INT64)
      END AS chr_order
    FROM `mitelman-db.prod.CytoBands_hg38` b
  ),
  -- Combine band info with counts (join on chromosome)
  combined AS (
    SELECT
      bands.chromosome,
      bands.band,
      bands.hg38_start,
      bands.hg38_stop,
      bands.chr_order,
      COALESCE(pivoted.amplification_count, 0) AS amplification_count,
      COALESCE(pivoted.gain_count, 0) AS gain_count,
      COALESCE(pivoted.loss_count, 0) AS loss_count,
      COALESCE(pivoted.homozygous_deletion_count, 0) AS homozygous_deletion_count,
      COALESCE(total_per_chromosome.total, 0) AS total_cases
    FROM bands
    LEFT JOIN pivoted ON bands.chromosome = pivoted.Chromosome
    LEFT JOIN total_per_chromosome ON bands.chromosome = total_per_chromosome.Chromosome
  )
SELECT
  chromosome,
  band,
  hg38_start,
  hg38_stop,
  amplification_count,
  gain_count,
  loss_count,
  homozygous_deletion_count,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(amplification_count, total_cases) * 100, 2) AS amplification_frequency,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(gain_count, total_cases) * 100, 2) AS gain_frequency,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(loss_count, total_cases) * 100, 2) AS loss_frequency,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(homozygous_deletion_count, total_cases) * 100, 2) AS homozygous_deletion_frequency
FROM combined
ORDER BY chr_order ASC, hg38_start ASC, hg38_stop ASC

SELECT DISTINCT
  cc.RefNo,
  cc.CaseNo,
  cc.InvNo,
  cc.Clone,
  kc.CloneShort,
  cc.ChrOrd,
  cc.Start,
  cc.`End`
FROM `mitelman-db.prod.CytoConverted` cc
JOIN `mitelman-db.prod.KaryClone` kc
  ON cc.RefNo = kc.RefNo
  AND cc.CaseNo = kc.CaseNo
  AND cc.InvNo = kc.InvNo
  AND cc.Clone = kc.CloneNo
WHERE cc.Clone IN (
  SELECT Clone
  FROM `mitelman-db.prod.CytoConverted`
  WHERE RefNo = cc.RefNo AND CaseNo = cc.CaseNo AND InvNo = cc.InvNo AND Clone = cc.Clone
    AND (
      (ChrOrd = 13 AND Start >= 48303751 AND `End` <= 48481890 AND Type = 'loss')
      OR (ChrOrd = 17 AND Start >= 7668421 AND `End` <= 7687490 AND Type = 'loss')
      OR (ChrOrd = 11 AND Start >= 108223067 AND `End` <= 108369102 AND Type = 'gain')
    )
  GROUP BY Clone
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
    WHEN (ChrOrd = 13 AND Start >= 48303751 AND `End` <= 48481890 AND Type = 'loss') THEN 1
    WHEN (ChrOrd = 17 AND Start >= 7668421 AND `End` <= 7687490 AND Type = 'loss') THEN 2
    WHEN (ChrOrd = 11 AND Start >= 108223067 AND `End` <= 108369102 AND Type = 'gain') THEN 3
  END) = 3
)
ORDER BY cc.RefNo, cc.CaseNo, cc.InvNo, cc.Clone, cc.ChrOrd
pred.bq111:
WITH mitelman_cases AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT c.RefNo, c.CaseNo
  FROM `mitelman-db.prod.Cytogen` c
  WHERE c.Morph = '3111' AND c.Topo = '0401'
),
mitelman_aberrations AS (
  SELECT cc.RefNo, cc.CaseNo, cc.Chr, cc.Type, cc.Start, cc.`End`
  FROM `mitelman-db.prod.CytoConverted` cc
  INNER JOIN mitelman_cases mc ON cc.RefNo = mc.RefNo AND cc.CaseNo = mc.CaseNo
  WHERE cc.Type IN ('amp', 'gain', 'loss', 'homodel', 'heterodel')
),
mitelman_cytoband_counts AS (
  SELECT cb.chromosome, cb.cytoband_name, cb.hg38_start, cb.hg38_stop,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(ma.RefNo, '_', ma.CaseNo)) AS total_cases,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ma.Type = 'amp' THEN CONCAT(ma.RefNo, '_', ma.CaseNo) END) AS amp_count,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ma.Type = 'gain' THEN CONCAT(ma.RefNo, '_', ma.CaseNo) END) AS gain_count,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ma.Type = 'loss' THEN CONCAT(ma.RefNo, '_', ma.CaseNo) END) AS loss_count,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ma.Type = 'homodel' THEN CONCAT(ma.RefNo, '_', ma.CaseNo) END) AS homodel_count,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ma.Type = 'heterodel' THEN CONCAT(ma.RefNo, '_', ma.CaseNo) END) AS heterodel_count
  FROM `mitelman-db.prod.CytoBands_hg38` cb
  LEFT JOIN mitelman_aberrations ma
    ON ma.Chr = cb.chromosome
    AND ma.Start < cb.hg38_stop
    AND ma.`End` > cb.hg38_start
  GROUP BY cb.chromosome, cb.cytoband_name, cb.hg38_start, cb.hg38_stop
),
mitelman_freq AS (
  SELECT chromosome, cytoband_name,
         SAFE_DIVIDE(amp_count, total_cases) AS freq_amp,
         SAFE_DIVIDE(gain_count, total_cases) AS freq_gain,
         SAFE_DIVIDE(loss_count, total_cases) AS freq_loss,
         SAFE_DIVIDE(homodel_count, total_cases) AS freq_homodel,
         SAFE_DIVIDE(heterodel_count, total_cases) AS freq_heterodel
  FROM mitelman_cytoband_counts
  WHERE total_cases >= 5
),
tcga_cnv AS (
  SELECT chromosome, cytoband_name,
         freq_amp, freq_gain, freq_loss, freq_homodel, freq_heterodel
  FROM `isb-cgc-bq.TCGA_versioned.PANCANCER_CNV_cytoband` 
  WHERE project_short_name = 'BRCA'
),
combined AS (
  SELECT m.chromosome, m.cytoband_name,
         m.freq_amp AS m_freq_amp, t.freq_amp AS t_freq_amp,
         m.freq_gain AS m_freq_gain, t.freq_gain AS t_freq_gain,
         m.freq_loss AS m_freq_loss, t.freq_loss AS t_freq_loss,
         m.freq_homodel AS m_freq_homodel, t.freq_homodel AS t_freq_homodel,
         m.freq_heterodel AS m_freq_heterodel, t.freq_heterodel AS t_freq_heterodel
  FROM mitelman_freq m
  INNER JOIN tcga_cnv t ON m.chromosome = t.chromosome AND m.cytoband_name = t.cytoband_name
),
correlations AS (
  SELECT chromosome,
         CORR(m_freq_amp, t_freq_amp) AS corr_amp,
         CORR(m_freq_gain, t_freq_gain) AS corr_gain,
         CORR(m_freq_loss, t_freq_loss) AS corr_loss,
         CORR(m_freq_homodel, t_freq_homodel) AS corr_homodel,
         CORR(m_freq_heterodel, t_freq_heterodel) AS corr_heterodel,
         COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM combined
  GROUP BY chromosome
  HAVING n >= 5
)
SELECT chromosome,
       corr_amp,
       `isb-cgc-bq.functions.corr_pvalue_current`(corr_amp, n) AS pvalue_amp,
       corr_gain,
       `isb-cgc-bq.functions.corr_pvalue_current`(corr_gain, n) AS pvalue_gain,
       corr_loss,
       `isb-cgc-bq.functions.corr_pvalue_current`(corr_loss, n) AS pvalue_loss,
       corr_homodel,
       `isb-cgc-bq.functions.corr_pvalue_current`(corr_homodel, n) AS pvalue_homodel,
       corr_heterodel,
       `isb-cgc-bq.functions.corr_pvalue_current`(corr_heterodel, n) AS pvalue_heterodel
FROM correlations
ORDER BY chromosome

WITH genotype_data AS (
    SELECT 
        v."reference_name",
        v."start",
        v."reference_bases",
        v."alternate_bases",
        f.value AS call_entry,
        f.value:"sample_id"::STRING AS sample_id,
        f.value:"genotype"::VARIANT AS genotype
    FROM _1000_GENOMES._1000_GENOMES.VARIANTS v,
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => v."call") f
    WHERE v."reference_name" = 'X'
      AND v."start" NOT BETWEEN 59999 AND 2699519
      AND v."start" NOT BETWEEN 154931042 AND 155260559
      AND v."reference_bases" IN ('A','C','G','T')
      AND ARRAY_SIZE(v."alternate_bases") = 1
      AND v."alternate_bases"[0]::STRING IN ('A','C','G','T')
),
allele_classification AS (
    SELECT 
        sample_id,
        CASE 
            WHEN genotype[0]::INT = 0 AND genotype[1]::INT = 0 THEN 'homozygous_reference'
            WHEN genotype[0]::INT > 0 AND genotype[1]::INT > 0 AND genotype[0]::INT = genotype[1]::INT THEN 'homozygous_alternate'
            WHEN (genotype[0]::INT IS NULL OR genotype[1]::INT IS NULL OR genotype[0]::INT != genotype[1]::INT) 
                 AND (COALESCE(genotype[0]::INT,0) > 0 OR COALESCE(genotype[1]::INT,0) > 0) THEN 'heterozygous'
            ELSE 'other'
        END AS call_type
    FROM genotype_data
    WHERE genotype IS NOT NULL
      AND ARRAY_SIZE(genotype) >= 1
),
aggregated AS (
    SELECT 
        sample_id,
        COUNT(*) AS total_callable_sites,
        COUNT_IF(call_type = 'homozygous_reference') AS homozygous_reference_count,
        COUNT_IF(call_type = 'homozygous_alternate') AS homozygous_alternate_count,
        COUNT_IF(call_type = 'heterozygous') AS heterozygous_count,
        COUNT_IF(call_type IN ('homozygous_alternate','heterozygous')) AS total_snvs
    FROM allele_classification
    WHERE call_type != 'other'
    GROUP BY sample_id
)
SELECT 
    sample_id,
    total_callable_sites,
    homozygous_reference_count,
    homozygous_alternate_count,
    heterozygous_count,
    total_snvs,
    ROUND(heterozygous_count / NULLIF(total_snvs, 0) * 100, 2) AS heterozygous_percentage,
    ROUND(homozygous_alternate_count / NULLIF(total_snvs, 0) * 100, 2) AS homozygous_alternate_percentage
FROM aggregated
ORDER BY heterozygous_percentage DESC, sample_id

allele_counts AS (

        vc."end",
        vc."reference_name",
        vc."reference_bases",
        vc."alternate_bases",
        vc.call_value,
        sp."Super_Population",
        CASE 
            WHEN vc.call_value:"GT"::STRING = '0|0' THEN 0
            WHEN vc.call_value:"GT"::STRING IN ('0|1', '1|0') THEN 1
            WHEN vc.call_value:"GT"::STRING = '1|1' THEN 2
            ELSE NULL
        END AS alt_allele_count
    FROM variant_calls vc
    JOIN sample_population sp ON vc.call_value:"sample_id"::STRING = sp."Sample"
),
grouped_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        "start",
        "end",
        "reference_name",
        "reference_bases",
        "alternate_bases",
        CASE WHEN "Super_Population" = 'EAS' THEN 'case' ELSE 'control' END AS group_type,
        SUM(alt_allele_count) AS alt_allele_sum,
        COUNT(*) * 2 AS total_alleles,
        (COUNT(*) * 2) - SUM(alt_allele_count) AS ref_allele_sum
    FROM allele_counts
    WHERE alt_allele_count IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY "start", "end", "reference_name", "reference_bases", "alternate_bases", group_type
),
contingency AS (
    SELECT 
        g1."start",
        g1."end",
        g1."reference_name",
        g1."reference_bases",
        g1."alternate_bases",
        COALESCE(g1.alt_allele_sum, 0) AS case_alt,
        COALESCE(g1.ref_allele_sum, 0) AS case_ref,
        COALESCE(g2.alt_allele_sum, 0) AS control_alt,
        COALESCE(g2.ref_allele_sum, 0) AS control_ref,
        COALESCE(g1.alt_allele_sum, 0) + COALESCE(g1.ref_allele_sum, 0) AS case_total,
        COALESCE(g2.alt_allele_sum, 0) + COALESCE(g2.ref_allele_sum, 0) AS control_total,
        COALESCE(g1.alt_allele_sum, 0) + COALESCE(g2.alt_allele_sum, 0) AS alt_total,
        COALESCE(g1.ref_allele_sum, 0) + COALESCE(g2.ref_allele_sum, 0) AS ref_total,
        COALESCE(g1.alt_allele_sum, 0) + COALESCE(g1.ref_allele_sum, 0) + COALESCE(g2.alt_allele_sum, 0) + COALESCE(g2.ref_allele_sum, 0) AS grand_total
    FROM grouped_counts g1
    JOIN grouped_counts g2 ON g1."start" = g2."start" AND g1."end" = g2."end" AND g1."reference_name" = g2."reference_name" AND g1."reference_bases" = g2."reference_bases" AND g1."alternate_bases" = g2."alternate_bases"
    WHERE g1.group_type = 'case' AND g2.group_type = 'control'
),
expected_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        "start",
        "end",
        "reference_name",
        "reference_bases",
        "alternate_bases",
        case_alt,
        case_ref,
        control_alt,
        control_ref,
        case_total,
        control_total,
        alt_total,
        ref_total,
        grand_total,
        (case_total * alt_total) / grand_total AS expected_case_alt,
        (case_total * ref_total) / grand_total AS expected_case_ref,
        (control_total * alt_total) / grand_total AS expected_control_alt,
        (control_total * ref_total) / grand_total AS expected_control_ref
    FROM contingency
    WHERE grand_total > 0
),
chi_squared AS (
    SELECT

        case_alt,
        case_ref,
        control_alt,
        control_ref,
        expected_case_alt,
        expected_case_ref,
        expected_control_alt,
        expected_control_ref,
        -- Yates's correction: subtract 0.5 from absolute difference
        CASE 
            WHEN expected_case_alt >= 5 AND expected_case_ref >= 5 AND expected_control_alt >= 5 AND expected_control_ref >= 5
            THEN 
                (POWER(ABS(case_alt - expected_case_alt) - 0.5, 2) / expected_case_alt) +
                (POWER(ABS(case_ref - expected_case_ref) - 0.5, 2) / expected_case_ref) +
                (POWER(ABS(control_alt - expected_control_alt) - 0.5, 2) / expected_control_alt) +
                (POWER(ABS(control_ref - expected_control_ref) - 0.5, 2) / expected_control_ref)
            ELSE NULL
        END AS chi_squared_score
    FROM expected_counts
)
SELECT 
    "start",
    "end",
    chi_squared_score
FROM chi_squared
WHERE chi_squared_score IS NOT NULL AND chi_squared_score >= 29.71679
ORDER BY chi_squared_score DESC
LIMIT 10

    v."reference_bases",

    v."variant_type",

    v."AF",
    v."AFR_AF",
    v."AMR_AF",
    v."ASN_AF",
    v."EUR_AF",
    v."AN",
    v."AC",
    -- Observed counts from AC and AN

      ELSE NULL

WITH
  -- Get compounds with 10-15 heavy atoms
  compounds_with_heavy_atoms AS (
    SELECT
      c.molregno,
      c.chembl_id,
      c.heavy_atoms
    FROM `bigquery-public-data.ebi_chembl.compound_properties_29` cp
    JOIN `bigquery-public-data.ebi_chembl.compound_structures_29` cs ON cp.molregno = cs.molregno
    JOIN `bigquery-public-data.ebi_chembl.chembl_id_lookup_30` c ON c.entity_id = cp.molregno AND c.entity_type = 'COMPOUND'
    WHERE cp.heavy_atoms BETWEEN 10 AND 15
  ),
  -- Get activities with pChEMBL > 10, non-null standard values, and count activities per assay/standard_type
  filtered_activities AS (
    SELECT
      a.activity_id,
      a.molregno,
      a.assay_id,
      a.standard_type,
      a.standard_value,
      a.standard_relation,
      a.pchembl_value,
      a.doc_id,
      a.data_validity_comment,
      a.potential_duplicate,
      COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY a.assay_id, a.standard_type, a.molregno) AS activities_in_assay,
      COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY a.assay_id, a.standard_type, a.molregno, a.doc_id, a.data_validity_comment) AS duplicate_count
    FROM `bigquery-public-data.ebi_chembl.activities_29` a
    JOIN compounds_with_heavy_atoms c ON a.molregno = c.molregno
    WHERE a.pchembl_value > 10
      AND a.standard_value IS NOT NULL
      AND a.standard_relation IS NOT NULL
  ),
  -- Keep only molecules with <5 activities and <2 duplicates in that assay/standard_type
  valid_activities AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM filtered_activities
    WHERE activities_in_assay < 5
      AND duplicate_count < 2
  ),
  -- Get documents and compute publication date based on rank within journal/year
  docs_with_publication_date AS (
    SELECT
      d.doc_id,
      d.journal,
      d.year,
      d.first_page,
      -- Year: use document year, default 1970 if missing
      COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(d.year AS INT64), 1970) AS pub_year,
      -- Compute percent rank within journal and year
      PERCENT_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY d.journal, d.year ORDER BY SAFE_CAST(d.first_page AS INT64)) AS pct_rank
    FROM `bigquery-public-data.ebi_chembl.docs_29` d
    WHERE d.journal IS NOT NULL AND d.year IS NOT NULL
  ),
  -- Calculate month and day from percent rank
  docs_with_date AS (
    SELECT
      doc_id,
      journal,
      year,
      first_page,
      pub_year,
      pct_rank,
      -- Month: floor(pct_rank * 11) + 1
      CASE
        WHEN pct_rank IS NOT NULL THEN FLOOR(pct_rank * 11) + 1
        ELSE 1
      END AS pub_month,
      -- Day: (floor(pct_rank * 308) % 28) + 1
      CASE
        WHEN pct_rank IS NOT NULL THEN MOD(FLOOR(pct_rank * 308), 28) + 1
        ELSE 1
      END AS pub_day
    FROM docs_with_publication_date
  ),
  -- Construct publication date
  docs_with_date_final AS (
    SELECT
      doc_id,
      journal,
      year,
      first_page,
      DATE(pub_year, pub_month, pub_day) AS publication_date
    FROM docs_with_date
  ),
  -- Pair molecules within same assay and standard_type
  molecule_pairs AS (
    SELECT
      a1.activity_id AS activity_id_1,
      a2.activity_id AS activity_id_2,
      a1.molregno AS molregno_1,
      a2.molregno AS molregno_2,
      a1.assay_id,
      a1.standard_type,
      a1.standard_value AS standard_value_1,
      a2.standard_value AS standard_value_2,
      a1.standard_relation AS standard_relation_1,
      a2.standard_relation AS standard_relation_2,
      a1.doc_id AS doc_id_1,
      a2.doc_id AS doc_id_2,
      c1.heavy_atoms AS heavy_atoms_1,
      c2.heavy_atoms AS heavy_atoms_2,
      cs1.canonical_smiles AS smiles_1,
      cs2.canonical_smiles AS smiles_2
    FROM valid_activities a1
    JOIN valid_activities a2
      ON a1.assay_id = a2.assay_id
      AND a1.standard_type = a2.standard_type
      AND a1.molregno < a2.molregno
    JOIN compounds_with_heavy_atoms c1 ON a1.molregno = c1.molregno
    JOIN compounds_with_heavy_atoms c2 ON a2.molregno = c2.molregno
    JOIN `bigquery-public-data.ebi_chembl.compound_structures_29` cs1 ON a1.molregno = cs1.molregno
    JOIN `bigquery-public-data.ebi_chembl.compound_structures_29` cs2 ON a2.molregno = cs2.molregno
  ),
  -- Get document dates for both molecules
  pairs_with_dates AS (
    SELECT
      mp.*,
      d1.publication_date AS pub_date_1,
      d2.publication_date AS pub_date_2,
      d1.doc_id AS doc_id_full_1,
      d2.doc_id AS doc_id_full_2
    FROM molecule_pairs mp
    LEFT JOIN docs_with_date_final d1 ON mp.doc_id_1 = d1.doc_id
    LEFT JOIN docs_with_date_final d2 ON mp.doc_id_2 = d2.doc_id
  ),
  -- Compute requested columns
  final_pairs AS (
    SELECT
      -- Maximum heavy atom count
      GREATEST(heavy_atoms_1, heavy_atoms_2) AS max_heavy_atoms,
      -- Latest publication date
      GREATEST(pub_date_1, pub_date_2) AS latest_publication_date,
      -- Highest document ID
      GREATEST(doc_id_full_1, doc_id_full_2) AS highest_doc_id,
      -- Classify change in standard values
      CASE
        WHEN standard_value_1 > standard_value_2 AND standard_relation_1 NOT IN ('<', '<<') AND standard_relation_2 NOT IN ('>', '>>') THEN 'decrease'
        WHEN standard_value_1 < standard_value_2 AND standard_relation_1 NOT IN ('>', '>>') AND standard_relation_2 NOT IN ('<', '<<') THEN 'increase'
        WHEN standard_value_1 = standard_value_2 AND standard_relation_1 IN ('=', '~') AND standard_relation_2 IN ('=', '~') THEN 'no-change'
        ELSE NULL
      END AS standard_change,
      -- UUID from activity IDs
      TO_HEX(MD5(TO_JSON_STRING(STRUCT(activity_id_1, activity_id_2)))) AS uuid_from_activity_ids,
      -- UUID from canonical SMILES
      TO_HEX(MD5(TO_JSON_STRING(STRUCT(smiles_1, smiles_2)))) AS uuid_from_smiles
    FROM pairs_with_dates
  )
SELECT *
FROM final_pairs
WHERE standard_change IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY max_heavy_atoms DESC, latest_publication_date DESC

),

-- Step 3: Join contributions to tracts and filter to Kings County (Brooklyn) tracts
-- Kings County FIPS code is 047 (county_fips_code in census_tracts_new_york is 3-digit)
-- The census_tract_geoid is 11 digits: state FIPS (2) + county FIPS (3) + tract code (6)
-- For Kings County, state FIPS = 36, county FIPS = 047
-- So geo_id starts with '36047'
contributions_by_tract AS (
  SELECT 
    zt.census_tract_geoid,
    AVG(fec.contribution_receipt_amount) AS avg_donation
  FROM fec_ny fec
  JOIN zip_to_tract zt
    ON fec.contributor_zip = zt.zip_code
  WHERE 
    -- Filter to Kings County tracts (Brooklyn)
    zt.census_tract_geoid LIKE '36047%'
  GROUP BY zt.census_tract_geoid
),

-- Step 4: Get median income from 2018 ACS 5-year data at census tract level
-- Using the census_tracts_new_york table joined with ACS data
-- The ACS median income data is in bigquery-public-data.census_bureau_acs.tract_2018_5yr
median_income AS (
  SELECT 
    geo_id,
    median_income
  FROM `bigquery-public-data.census_bureau_acs.tract_2018_5yr`
  WHERE 
    geo_id LIKE '36047%'
    AND median_income IS NOT NULL
)

-- Step 5: Combine results
SELECT 
  cbt.census_tract_geoid AS tract_geo_id,
  ROUND(cbt.avg_donation, 2) AS avg_donation_amount,
  mi.median_income
FROM contributions_by_tract cbt
JOIN median_income mi
  ON cbt.census_tract_geoid = mi.geo_id
ORDER BY cbt.census_tract_geoid

WITH
-- Filter to TCGA-LUAD and TCGA-LUSC collections, SM modality, VOLUME type
filtered AS (
    SELECT
        d."SOPInstanceUID",
        d."StudyInstanceUID",
        d."SeriesInstanceUID",
        d."PatientID",
        d."collection_id",
        d."gcs_url",
        d."Modality",
        d."ImageType",
        d."TransferSyntaxUID",
        d."SeriesDescription",
        d."collection_name"
    FROM IDC.IDC_V17.DICOM_ALL d
    WHERE d."collection_name" IN ('TCGA-LUAD', 'TCGA-LUSC')
      AND d."Modality" = 'SM'
      AND ARRAY_CONTAINS('VOLUME'::VARIANT, d."ImageType")
),
-- Determine compression type from TransferSyntaxUID
compression AS (
    SELECT
        f.*,
        CASE
            WHEN f."TransferSyntaxUID" IN (
                '1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.50',  -- JPEG Baseline
                '1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.51',  -- JPEG Extended
                '1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.57',  -- JPEG Lossless, Non-Hierarchical
                '1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.70'   -- JPEG Lossless, SV1
            ) THEN 'jpeg'
            WHEN f."TransferSyntaxUID" IN (
                '1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.90',  -- JPEG 2000 Lossless Only
                '1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.91'   -- JPEG 2000
            ) THEN 'jpeg2000'
            ELSE 'other'
        END AS compression_type
    FROM filtered f
),
-- Exclude 'other' compression
no_other AS (
    SELECT * FROM compression WHERE compression_type != 'other'
),
-- Get tissue type from DICOM metadata (SegmentedPropertyTypeCodeSequence)
tissue_info AS (
    SELECT
        n."SOPInstanceUID",
        n."StudyInstanceUID",
        n."SeriesInstanceUID",
        n."PatientID",
        n."collection_id",
        n."gcs_url",
        n."compression_type",
        n."collection_name",
        CASE
            WHEN dm."SegmentedPropertyTypeCodeSequence" LIKE '%86049000%' THEN 'tumor'
            WHEN dm."SegmentedPropertyTypeCodeSequence" LIKE '%17621005%' THEN 'normal'
            ELSE NULL
        END AS tissue_type
    FROM no_other n
    LEFT JOIN IDC.IDC_V17.DICOM_PIVOT dm
        ON n."SOPInstanceUID" = dm."SOPInstanceUID"
),
-- Filter to only normal or tumor
tissue_filtered AS (
    SELECT * FROM tissue_info WHERE tissue_type IS NOT NULL
),
-- Get embedding medium from DICOM metadata (look for Tissue freezing medium)
embedding AS (
    SELECT
        tf.*,
        CASE
            WHEN dm."EmbeddingMedium" = 'Tissue freezing medium' THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS has_freezing_medium
    FROM tissue_filtered tf
    LEFT JOIN IDC.IDC_V17.DICOM_METADATA dm
        ON tf."SOPInstanceUID" = dm."SOPInstanceUID"
),
-- Keep only those with Tissue freezing medium
embedding_filtered AS (
    SELECT * FROM embedding WHERE has_freezing_medium = 1
),
-- Get image dimensions and pixel spacing from DICOM_PIVOT or DICOM_METADATA_CURATED
image_attrs AS (
    SELECT
        e."SOPInstanceUID",
        e."StudyInstanceUID",
        e."SeriesInstanceUID",
        e."PatientID",
        e."collection_id",
        e."gcs_url",
        e."compression_type",
        e."tissue_type",
        e."collection_name",
        COALESCE(dp."max_TotalPixelMatrixColumns", 0) AS width,
        COALESCE(dp."max_TotalPixelMatrixRows", 0) AS height,
        COALESCE(dc."min_PixelSpacing_2sf", 0) AS pixel_spacing
    FROM embedding_filtered e
    LEFT JOIN IDC.IDC_V17.DICOM_METADATA_CURATED_SERIES_LEVEL dp
        ON e."SeriesInstanceUID" = dp."SeriesInstanceUID"
    LEFT JOIN IDC.IDC_V17.DICOM_METADATA_CURATED_SERIES_LEVEL dc
        ON e."SeriesInstanceUID" = dc."SeriesInstanceUID"
),
-- Assign cancer subtype
final AS (
    SELECT
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY i."SOPInstanceUID") AS digital_slide_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY i."StudyInstanceUID") AS case_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY i."SeriesInstanceUID") AS physical_slide_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY i."PatientID") AS patient_id,
        i."collection_id" AS collection_id,
        i."SOPInstanceUID" AS instance_id,
        i."gcs_url" AS gcs_url,
        i.width,
        i.height,
        i.pixel_spacing,
        i.compression_type,
        i.tissue_type,
        CASE
            WHEN i."collection_name" = 'TCGA-LUAD' THEN 'luad'
            WHEN i."collection_name" = 'TCGA-LUSC' THEN 'lscc'
        END AS cancer_subtype
    FROM image_attrs i
)
SELECT * FROM final
ORDER BY instance_id ASC

pred.sf_bq455:
WITH series_stats AS (
    SELECT
        d."SeriesInstanceUID",
        d."SeriesNumber",
        d."PatientID",
        SUM(d."instance_size") / (1024 * 1024) AS series_size_mib,
        COUNT(DISTINCT d."SOPInstanceUID") AS num_images,
        COUNT(DISTINCT d."ImagePositionPatient") AS num_z_positions,
        COUNT(DISTINCT d."SliceLocation") AS num_slice_locations,
        COUNT(DISTINCT d."SliceThickness") AS num_slice_thickness,
        COUNT(DISTINCT d."Exposure") AS num_exposure,
        COUNT(DISTINCT d."ImageOrientationPatient") AS num_orientation,
        COUNT(DISTINCT d."PixelSpacing") AS num_pixel_spacing,
        COUNT(DISTINCT d."ImagePositionPatient") AS num_image_position,
        COUNT(DISTINCT d."Rows") AS num_rows,
        COUNT(DISTINCT d."Columns") AS num_columns,
        MIN(d."ImageOrientationPatient") AS orientation_sample
    FROM IDC.IDC_V17.DICOM_ALL d
    WHERE d."Modality" = 'CT'
      AND d."collection_name" != 'nlst'
      AND NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM LATERAL FLATTEN(input => d."ImageType") it
          WHERE it.value::VARCHAR = 'LOCALIZER'
      )
      AND d."TransferSyntaxUID" NOT IN ('1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.70', '1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.51')
    GROUP BY d."SeriesInstanceUID", d."SeriesNumber", d."PatientID"
    HAVING num_images = num_z_positions
       AND num_slice_thickness = 1
       AND num_exposure = 1
       AND num_orientation = 1
       AND num_pixel_spacing = 1
       AND num_image_position = num_images
       AND num_rows = 1
       AND num_columns = 1
),
orientation_check AS (
    SELECT
        s."SeriesInstanceUID",
        s."SeriesNumber",
        s."PatientID",
        s.series_size_mib,
        s.orientation_sample
    FROM series_stats s
    WHERE s.orientation_sample IS NOT NULL
      AND ABS(
          -- Compute z-component of cross product of x and y direction cosines
          -- orientation_sample is a JSON array [x1, x2, x3, y1, y2, y3]
          (s.orientation_sample[0]::FLOAT * s.orientation_sample[5]::FLOAT - s.orientation_sample[3]::FLOAT * s.orientation_sample[2]::FLOAT)
      ) BETWEEN 0.99 AND 1.01
)
SELECT
    o."SeriesInstanceUID",
    o."SeriesNumber",
    o."PatientID",
    ROUND(o.series_size_mib, 2) AS series_size_mib
FROM orientation_check o
ORDER BY o.series_size_mib DESC
LIMIT 5

WITH sorafenib_targets AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT pe_stable_id
  FROM `isb-cgc-bq.reactome_versioned.pe_to_pathway_v77`
  WHERE evidence_code = 'TAS'
    AND pe_stable_id IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT pe_stable_id
      FROM `isb-cgc-bq.reactome_versioned.pe_to_pathway_v77`
      WHERE pathway_stable_id IN (
        SELECT stable_id
        FROM `isb-cgc-bq.reactome_versioned.pathway_v77`
        WHERE lowest_level = TRUE
      )
    )
),
pathway_stats AS (
  SELECT
    p.pathway_stable_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.pe_stable_id IS NOT NULL THEN p.pe_stable_id END) AS targets_in_pathway,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.pe_stable_id IS NULL THEN p.pe_stable_id END) AS non_targets_in_pathway,
    COUNT(DISTINCT p.pe_stable_id) AS total_in_pathway
  FROM `isb-cgc-bq.reactome_versioned.pe_to_pathway_v77` p
  LEFT JOIN sorafenib_targets s ON p.pe_stable_id = s.pe_stable_id
  WHERE p.pathway_stable_id IN (
    SELECT stable_id
    FROM `isb-cgc-bq.reactome_versioned.pathway_v77`
    WHERE lowest_level = TRUE
  )
  GROUP BY p.pathway_stable_id
),
global_counts AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.pe_stable_id IS NOT NULL THEN p.pe_stable_id END) AS total_targets,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.pe_stable_id IS NULL THEN p.pe_stable_id END) AS total_non_targets
  FROM `isb-cgc-bq.reactome_versioned.pe_to_pathway_v77` p
  LEFT JOIN sorafenib_targets s ON p.pe_stable_id = s.pe_stable_id
  WHERE p.pathway_stable_id IN (
    SELECT stable_id
    FROM `isb-cgc-bq.reactome_versioned.pathway_v77`
    WHERE lowest_level = TRUE
  )
),
chi_squared AS (
  SELECT
    ps.pathway_stable_id,
    ps.targets_in_pathway,
    ps.non_targets_in_pathway,
    (ps.total_in_pathway - ps.targets_in_pathway - ps.non_targets_in_pathway) AS targets_outside_pathway,
    (gc.total_targets - ps.targets_in_pathway) AS non_targets_outside_pathway,
    -- Chi-squared formula: sum((O-E)^2/E)
    -- For simplicity, we compute the chi-squared statistic using the 2x2 contingency table
    -- O11 = targets_in_pathway, O12 = non_targets_in_pathway
    -- O21 = targets_outside_pathway, O22 = non_targets_outside_pathway
    -- E11 = (row1_total * col1_total) / grand_total, etc.
    -- We'll compute directly
    POW(ps.targets_in_pathway - (ps.total_in_pathway * gc.total_targets / (gc.total_targets + gc.total_non_targets)), 2) / (ps.total_in_pathway * gc.total_targets / (gc.total_targets + gc.total_non_targets)) +
    POW(ps.non_targets_in_pathway - (ps.total_in_pathway * gc.total_non_targets / (gc.total_targets + gc.total_non_targets)), 2) / (ps.total_in_pathway * gc.total_non_targets / (gc.total_targets + gc.total_non_targets)) +
    POW((gc.total_targets - ps.targets_in_pathway) - ((gc.total_targets + gc.total_non_targets - ps.total_in_pathway) * gc.total_targets / (gc.total_targets + gc.total_non_targets)), 2) / (((gc.total_targets + gc.total_non_targets - ps.total_in_pathway) * gc.total_targets / (gc.total_targets + gc.total_non_targets))) +
    POW((gc.total_non_targets - ps.non_targets_in_pathway) - ((gc.total_targets + gc.total_non_targets - ps.total_in_pathway) * gc.total_non_targets / (gc.total_targets + gc.total_non_targets)), 2) / (((gc.total_targets + gc.total_non_targets - ps.total_in_pathway) * gc.total_non_targets / (gc.total_targets + gc.total_non_targets))) AS chi_squared_stat
  FROM pathway_stats ps
  CROSS JOIN global_counts gc
)
SELECT
  pathway_stable_id,
  targets_in_pathway,
  non_targets_in_pathway,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pe_stable_id) FROM `isb-cgc-bq.reactome_versioned.pe_to_pathway_v77` WHERE pathway_stable_id = cs.pathway_stable_id) - targets_in_pathway - non_targets_in_pathway AS targets_outside_pathway,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pe_stable_id) FROM `isb-cgc-bq.reactome_versioned.pe_to_pathway_v77` WHERE pathway_stable_id NOT IN (SELECT stable_id FROM `isb-cgc-bq.reactome_versioned.pathway_v77` WHERE lowest_level = TRUE)) - non_targets_in_pathway AS non_targets_outside_pathway
FROM chi_squared cs
ORDER BY chi_squared_stat DESC
LIMIT 3

WITH zip_block_group_overlap AS (
  SELECT
    z.zip_code,
    bg.geoid AS block_group_id,
    ST_AREA(ST_INTERSECTION(z.zip_code_geom, bg.block_group_geom)) / ST_AREA(bg.block_group_geom) AS overlap_ratio
  FROM `bigquery-public-data.geo_us_boundaries.zip_codes` z
  CROSS JOIN `bigquery-public-data.geo_census_block_groups.block_groups` bg
  WHERE z.state_code = 'CO'
    AND ST_INTERSECTS(z.zip_code_geom, bg.block_group_geom)
),
bank_locations_per_block_group AS (
  SELECT
    l.zip_code,
    bg.geoid AS block_group_id,
    COUNT(*) AS bank_count
  FROM `bigquery-public-data.fdic_banks.locations` l
  JOIN `bigquery-public-data.geo_census_block_groups.block_groups` bg
    ON ST_WITHIN(ST_GEOGPOINT(l.branch_lon, l.branch_lat), bg.block_group_geom)
  WHERE l.state = 'CO'
  GROUP BY l.zip_code, bg.geoid
),
weighted_banks AS (
  SELECT
    z.zip_code,
    z.block_group_id,
    z.overlap_ratio * COALESCE(b.bank_count, 0) AS weighted_bank_count
  FROM zip_block_group_overlap z
  LEFT JOIN bank_locations_per_block_group b
    ON z.zip_code = b.zip_code AND z.block_group_id = b.block_group_id
)
SELECT zip_code
FROM weighted_banks
GROUP BY zip_code
ORDER BY SUM(weighted_bank_count) DESC
LIMIT 1

    `by` AS user_id,

  WHERE time IS NOT NULL
    AND `by` IS NOT NULL
    AND TIMESTAMP_SECONDS(time) < TIMESTAMP('2024-09-10')
  GROUP BY user_id, activity_month
),
user_first_month AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    MIN(activity_month) AS first_month
  FROM user_activity_months
  GROUP BY user_id
),
user_month_series AS (
  SELECT
    u.user_id,
    DATE_ADD(u.first_month, INTERVAL offset MONTH) AS expected_month
  FROM user_first_month u
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(GENERATE_ARRAY(0, DATE_DIFF(DATE('2024-09-01'), u.first_month, MONTH))) AS offset
),
user_activity_status AS (
  SELECT
    s.user_id,
    s.expected_month,
    CASE WHEN a.activity_month IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_active
  FROM user_month_series s
  LEFT JOIN user_activity_months a
    ON s.user_id = a.user_id AND s.expected_month = a.activity_month
),
user_last_active_month AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    MAX(expected_month) AS last_active_month
  FROM user_activity_status
  WHERE is_active = 1
  GROUP BY user_id
),
user_inactive_after_last AS (
  SELECT
    s.user_id,
    s.expected_month,
    u.last_active_month
  FROM user_activity_status s
  JOIN user_last_active_month u

  WHERE s.expected_month > u.last_active_month
    AND s.is_active = 0
),
user_month_number AS (
  SELECT
    i.user_id,
    DATE_DIFF(i.expected_month, f.first_month, MONTH) + 1 AS month_number
  FROM user_inactive_after_last i
  JOIN user_first_month f ON i.user_id = f.user_id
)
SELECT
  user_id,
  month_number
FROM user_month_number
ORDER BY month_number DESC
LIMIT 1
